creator: sc@verinet.dk
text:
Verinet is established in 1992 and is the largest Scandinavian Colocation Provider with 73 hosting centers in 39 countries. As a Open Source Solution Provider, a Linux Care Center and a eGovernance Provider, Verinet is providing Hosting, IT Outsourcing and Colocation based on Linux and Open Source. 

Verinet web: www.verinet.dk/serverhosting.htm
